_comment: Replace every /resolve/main/ with /resolve/<commit_sha>/ before Phase 1 — see scripts/resolve_pins.py. Filenames in 'dest' MUST match what the workflow references (e.g. CLIPLoaderGGUF widget value, VAELoader widget value).

weights._comment: Workflow references 'z_image_turbo_vae.safetensors' as filename. PLAN.md cites Tongyi-MAI/Z-Image-Turbo/ae.safetensors; verify the filename match before Phase 1 — may need to rename on download or change workflow.
